title: Set up database schema (Rex - Rust/SQLx)
description: Design and implement the core database schema for user management.
details: Create migrations for users, roles, and permissions tables. Use SQLx for compile-time query checking.
test_strategy: Run migrations against test database; verify schema matches expected structure

subtasks.title: Create users table migration
subtasks.description: SQL migration for the users table with email, password_hash, created_at columns.
subtasks.details: Include unique constraint on email, NOT NULL on required fields.

subtasks.title: Create roles table migration
subtasks.description: SQL migration for roles and user_roles junction table.
subtasks.details: Roles: admin, editor, viewer. Junction table with composite primary key.
subtasks.test_strategy: Verify role assignment and cascade deletes.

decision_points.description: UUID vs auto-increment for primary keys
Soft delete vs hard delete for user records
options: Hard delete with audit log table

title: Implement authentication service (Grizz - Go/JWT)
description: Build JWT-based authentication with refresh token rotation.
details: Use RS256 signing. Access tokens expire in 15 minutes, refresh tokens in 7 days. Store refresh tokens in database.
test_strategy: Test token generation, validation, expiry; test refresh rotation

subtasks.title: Create JWT signing module
subtasks.description: Module for generating and validating JWTs with RS256.
subtasks.details: Load RSA keys from environment. Support key rotation via kid header.
subtasks.test_strategy: Verify token claims, expiry, and signature validation.

subtasks.title: Implement refresh token storage
subtasks.description: Database-backed refresh token storage with rotation tracking.
subtasks.details: Track token family for rotation detection. Revoke entire family on reuse.
subtasks.test_strategy: Test rotation, reuse detection, family revocation.

subtasks.title: Add login and logout endpoints
subtasks.description: HTTP handlers for login, logout, and token refresh.
subtasks.test_strategy: Integration tests for each endpoint with valid and invalid credentials.

decision_points.description: Token storage strategy on client side
options: In-memory only - most secure but lost on refresh

title: Build user management API (Grizz - Go/REST)
description: CRUD API for user profiles with role-based access control.
details: RESTful endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/users. Admin-only for create and delete. Users can update own profile.
test_strategy: Test RBAC enforcement; test CRUD operations; test pagination

subtasks.title: Implement user CRUD handlers
subtasks.description: HTTP handlers for user create, read, update, delete.
subtasks.details: Use repository pattern. Return 404 for missing users, 409 for duplicate email.
subtasks.test_strategy: Unit tests for each handler with mocked repository.

title: Implement audit logging (Blaze - TypeScript/React)
description: Create an audit log dashboard showing user actions and system events.
details: Display sortable, filterable table of audit events. Include timestamp, actor, action, and resource columns.
test_strategy: Verify table renders with mock data; test sorting and filtering

title: Write integration test suite (Tess - Testing)
description: End-to-end test suite covering authentication and user management flows.
details: Use test containers for database. Cover happy path and error scenarios for all endpoints.
test_strategy: All tests must pass in CI; coverage target 80%

options: Parallel with isolated databases per test
Sequential with shared database and cleanup
